title: Private Limited Company Registration in Bangalore | Virtual Auditor
description: Register a Private Limited Company in Bangalore with Virtual Auditor. Expert CA-assisted SPICe+ incorporation. Same-week delivery. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for Private Limited Company registration in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor provides complete Pvt Ltd incorporation services in Bangalore, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). We handle name approval through Certificate of Incorporation and post-registration compliance.

What is Private Limited Company Registration?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Certificate of Incorporation from the Registrar of Companies (ROC Bangalore). PAN and TAN allotment through SPICe+ simultaneous processing. Customised MOA and AOA drafted to reflect your specific business objects, shareholder agreements, and vesting provisions (for startups). All filed forms with MCA acknowledgment receipts. GST registration (applied simultaneously if applicable). Professional tax registration for Karnataka (PTRC and PTEC). Post-incorporation compliance checklist covering board meetings, annual return filings, statutory audit timelines, and event-based compliances.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Company Registration in Bangalore
  Bangalore is India's startup capital, and Virtual Auditor understands startup incorporation requirements inside out. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) has incorporated 100+ companies including venture-backed startups requiring customised AOA with vesting clauses, anti-dilution provisions, and investor-friendly governance structures. Our Bangalore office at 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road is centrally located for in-person meetings. We handle ROC Bangalore coordination directly. Dual qualification (FCA + ACS) means both financial and corporate governance compliance handled under one engagement — no separate CA and CS fees.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Free consultation — business structure advisory, shareholder pattern, authorised capital planning. Step 2: DSC procurement and DIN application for all proposed directors. Step 3: Name reservation via RUN or SPICe+ Part B — we check name availability and advise on naming strategy. Step 4: MOA and AOA drafting with customised objects clause and governance provisions. Step 5: SPICe+ filing with MCA — incorporation, PAN, TAN, EPFO, ESIC, and GST in a single application. Step 6: Certificate of Incorporation issued — typically 5-7 working days. Step 7: Post-incorporation: statutory registers, first board meeting, share certificates, compliance calendar, and bank account opening support.
  HEADING2: Bangalore Startup Ecosystem Support
  As a startup hub, Bangalore companies often need more than just basic incorporation. Virtual Auditor provides startup-specific add-ons: DPIIT Startup India recognition filing (for Section 80-IAC tax holiday and angel tax exemption), ESOP scheme design and Rule 12(1) compliance, FEMA compliance for foreign investment rounds (FC-GPR filing with RBI), and ongoing virtual CFO services. We serve as your embedded finance office from day one, scaling services as you grow from seed to Series A and beyond.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Ready to incorporate your Private Limited Company in Bangalore? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001
  Fixed-fee pricing. Certificate of Incorporation in 5-7 working days.

faqs.q: How long does Pvt Ltd company registration take in Bangalore?
faqs.a: 5-7 working days from SPICe+ filing. Including name reservation and DSC, the total timeline is 7-10 working days. We provide a clear timeline at the start of the engagement.

faqs.q: What is the minimum capital required for a Pvt Ltd company in Bangalore?
faqs.a: There is no minimum paid-up capital requirement under the Companies Act, 2013. However, the authorised capital determines the ROC filing fee (Rs 500 for up to Rs 1 lakh authorised capital). We recommend Rs 1-10 lakh authorised capital for startups.

faqs.q: Can Virtual Auditor help with DPIIT Startup India registration after incorporation?
faqs.a: Yes. We file DPIIT Startup India recognition immediately after incorporation, which unlocks tax benefits under Section 80-IAC (3 years of tax holiday) and angel tax exemption under Section 56(2)(viib). The DPIIT application is typically approved within 48 hours.
